meta.summary: Minigraph 0.21 command-line runtime for sequence-to-graph mapping, reference pangenome graph construction, assembly-to-graph alignment, and minigraph helper scripts.
meta.description: Minigraph 0.21 command-line runtime for sequence-to-graph mapping, reference pangenome graph construction, assembly-to-graph alignment, and minigraph helper scripts.

test: { minigraph 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'Usage: minigraph [options] <target.gfa> <query.fa> [...]' >/dev/null && { minigraph 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F -- '-x STR       preset' >/dev/null

{ mgutils.js 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'Usage: mgutils.js <command> [arguments]' >/dev/null && { mgutils-es6.js 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'Usage: mgutils-es6.js <command> [arguments]' >/dev/null && gafcall.js version | grep -Fx 'r112' >/dev/null
ldd "$(command -v minigraph)" 2>&1 | grep -F 'not found' && exit 1 || true; ldd "$(command -v k8)" 2>&1 | grep -F 'not found' && exit 1 || true

tmp=/tmp/taf-minigraph-map-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; minigraph /usr/local/share/minigraph/testdata/MT-human.fa /usr/local/share/minigraph/testdata/MT-orangA.fa > out.paf 2> out.log; test -s out.paf; grep -F 'PA#NC_002083.1X' out.paf >/dev/null; gzip -c /usr/local/share/minigraph/testdata/MT-orangA.fa > query.fa.gz; minigraph /usr/local/share/minigraph/testdata/MT-human.fa query.fa.gz > gz.paf 2> gz.log; test -s gz.paf; grep -F 'PA#NC_002083.1X' gz.paf >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-minigraph-ggen-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; minigraph -cxggs -t1 -l10k /usr/local/share/minigraph/testdata/MT.gfa /usr/local/share/minigraph/testdata/MT-chimp.fa /usr/local/share/minigraph/testdata/MT-orangA.fa > out.gfa 2> out.log; test -s out.gfa; grep -F 'SN:Z:MT_human' out.gfa >/dev/null; grep -F 'SR:i:0' out.gfa >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-minigraph-call-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; minigraph -xasm -t1 -l10k --call /usr/local/share/minigraph/testdata/MT.gfa /usr/local/share/minigraph/testdata/MT-orangA.fa > call.bed 2> call.log; test -s call.bed; grep -F 'MT_human' call.bed >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: minigraph
upstream.citation: Li, Feng, and Chu 2020, The design and construction of reference pangenome graphs with minigraph
